# libredash validate

Validate a configuration-as-code project

## Usage

```sh
libredash validate [project] [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--json` | bool | `false` | emit JSON diagnostics |
| `--project` | string | `dashboards/libredash.yaml` | project path |
